error.heic-not-supported: HEIC and HEIF images are not directly supported. Please export as JPEG before upload — the iOS share sheet does this automatically in most apps.
error.size-too-large: File too large ({{sizeMb}} MB). Maximum: {{limitMb}} MB.
error.pdf-page-limit: PDF too long ({{actualPages}} pages). Maximum: {{limitPages}} pages. Please split the document before upload.
error.image-dimension-limit: Image too large ({{width}}×{{height}} px). Maximum: {{limitPx}} px per edge.
error.pdf-unreadable: PDF could not be read. It may be damaged or encrypted.
error.generic: File could not be processed. Please try again.

pdf-rasterization.title: PDF will be uploaded as images
pdf-rasterization.explanation: This PDF has no extractable text. Phylax must send the pages as images to the AI provider so the content can be classified.
pdf-rasterization.consequence: The image data leaves your device and is processed by the AI provider.
pdf-rasterization.remember-checkbox: Remember for this session (until next browser restart)

error.network: Could not reach the AI provider. Please retry.
error.rate-limit: AI provider rate-limited. Please retry in a few minutes.
error.auth: API key invalid or expired. Please check it in Settings.
error.content-policy: AI provider refused the content. Please remove sensitive data and retry.
error.payload-too-large: Document too large for the AI provider. Please split or shorten.
error.response-truncated: AI response too long. Please import the document in smaller parts.
error.malformed-response: Unexpected response from the AI provider. Please retry.
error.ai-config-missing: AI not configured yet. Please set your API key in Settings.
error.server: AI provider reported a server error. Please retry.

ai.uncertain: Classification uncertain. Please confirm this is a {{type}} document.

flow.title: Import document
flow.memory-hint: The source file is held in memory only. Closing this dialog discards it.
flow.no-profile: No profile yet. Please create a profile first.

classification-confirm.title: Confirm document type
classification-confirm.body: Classification is uncertain (confidence {{confidence}}). Is this a {{type}} document?

review.title: Review extracted entries
review.intro: Choose which entries to keep. You can edit each entry before saving.
review.lab-meta-hint: A lab report dated {{date}} will be created automatically.
review.lab-meta-hint-with-name: A lab report from "{{labName}}" dated {{date}} will be created automatically.
review.empty: No entries of this type found.

done.title: Imported
done.lab-report: A new lab report was created.

source-skipped.size-limit: Source file exceeds the 10 MB size limit. Entries still imported.
source-skipped.quota: Browser storage full. Entries imported, source not saved.
source-skipped.encryption-failed: Source file could not be encrypted. Entries imported.
source-skipped.unknown: Source file could not be saved. Entries imported.
